zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg於1146年出生時，他的父親Pribislav of Mecklenburg27歲，母親Wojsława Gryfita27歲。他和Mathilde von Sachsen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1227年1月28日享年81歲，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗多藍納 明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg于1146年出生时，他的父亲Pribislav of Mecklenburg27岁，母亲Wojsława Gryfita27岁。他和Mathilde von Sachsen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1227年1月28日享年81岁，埋葬在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可羅斯托克可萊斯 巴德 多朗多藍納 明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Burwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname or metonymic occupational name derived from medieval Latin burdinus ‘mule, hinny’ or, alternatively, from Occitan burdir ‘to sport or amuse oneself’.

French: possibly also a derivative of Old French borde ‘smallholding’ (from Frankish bord ‘plank’), used as a designation for a tenant farmer, or of Old French bo(u)rde ‘lie’, used as a nickname for a liar.

variants.name: Burden
meanings: (southern England, of Norman origin): from a diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Burdo, for which compare Burdett . Burdonus and other derivatives of the Gaulish personal name Burdo (‘mule’) are found in France, where it is rare and the similar French surname may derive instead from Old French bourdon in the sense ‘pilgrim's staff’ (compare Bourdon 1). The personal name, whether of ancient Germanic or Gaulish origin, does occur in medieval England, but rarely.

habitational name from any of various places called Burdon or Burden. Burden in Yorkshire and Great Burdon in County Durham are named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’ + dūn ‘hill’; Burdon in Tyne and Wear is named with Old English b̄re ‘byre’ + denu ‘valley’.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg was born in 1146, his father, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, was 27 and his mother, Wojsława Gryfita, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Mathilde von Sachsen. He died on 28 January 1227, at the age of 81, and was buried in Doberaner Münster, Bad Doberan, Rostock, East Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg est né en 1146, son père, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Wojsława Gryfita, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mathilde von Sachsen. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1227, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Allemagne de l'Est.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg 1146 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pribislav of Mecklenburg 27 und seine Mutter Wojsława Gryfita 27. Er hatte mit Mathilde von Sachsen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. Januar 1227 im Alter von 81 Jahren und wurde in Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg(이)가 1146년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pribislav of Mecklenburg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Wojsława Gryfita(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Mathilde von Sachsen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1227년 1월 28일 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 동독 로스톡 크레이스 바드 도베란 도베랜어 u스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg nasceu em 1146, seu pai, Pribislav of Mecklenburg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Wojsława Gryfita, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mathilde von Sachsen. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1227, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Doberaner Münster, Kreis Bad Doberan, Rostock, Deutsche Demokratische Republik.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Burwin (I.) von Mecklenburg родился в 1146 г., его отцу по имени Pribislav of Mecklenburg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Wojsława Gryfita, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mathilde von Sachsen. Он умер 28 января 1227 г. в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности добиранир мuнстир, крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия.
